title: ModMenu Dark Mode
description: A basic resource pack that gives ModMenu a dark-ui similar to Vanilla Tweaks.
body:
# ModMenu Dark Mode
A basic resource pack that gives ModMenu a dark UI similar to Vanilla Tweaks.

![Use Example](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/8GcCoGPQ/images/c1900fc9b3cacd0381f255d74c7e2390905e4309.png)
